Name: insert_notes
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::uuid AS "author_id", $3::text AS "title" UNION ALL SELECT $4::uuid AS "id", $5::uuid AS "author_id", $6::text AS "title") AS data WHERE data."author_id" = $7::uuid), check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."notes" ("id", "author_id", "title") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."author_id", check_mutation_result."title" FROM check_mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM check_count) = 1 RETURNING *), check_nested_replies AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT 0::int AS "_parent_idx", $8::text AS "body", $9::text AS "visibility", NULL::uuid AS "note_id" UNION ALL SELECT 1::int AS "_parent_idx", $10::text AS "body", $11::text AS "visibility", NULL::uuid AS "note_id") AS data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mutation_result g WHERE data."note_id" = g."id" AND g."author_id" = $12::uuid) AND data."visibility" = $13::text), nested_replies_check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_nested_replies) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), nested_replies AS (INSERT INTO "public"."note_replies" ("body", "visibility", "note_id") SELECT check_nested_replies."body", check_nested_replies."visibility", mr."id" FROM check_nested_replies JOIN (SELECT *, (ROW_NUMBER() OVER ())::int - 1 AS "_parent_idx" FROM mutation_result) AS mr ON mr."_parent_idx"=check_nested_replies."_parent_idx" WHERE (SELECT status FROM nested_replies_check_count) = 1 RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies)))
